news.headline: Landsbankinn hf. corrects covered bond exchange results, published on May 14, 2025 at 14:04:01 CEST.

news.summary: Urban Outfitters has launched On Rotation, a culturally immersive in-store concept, debuting with Nike. This innovative retail experience aims to encourage exploration, creativity, and meaningful interactions through a handpicked selection of products. The announcement was made on May 14, 2025, showcasing Urban Outfitters' commitment to providing unique and engaging shopping experiences.
news.headline: Urban Outfitters partners with Nike to launch 'On Rotation' retail experience for culture-driven discovery.

news.summary: In Riyadh, Saudi Arabia, the Saudi Arabian Mining Company (Maaden) has signed an agreement with MP Materials Corp to potentially establish a complete rare earth supply chain. Maaden, listed as 1211 on the Saudi Exchange, is known as one of the rapidly expanding mining companies globally. On the other hand, MP Materials, traded as NYSE: MP, is a fully integrated rare earth producer based in America. The two companies inked a Memorandum of Understanding (MoU) during the U.S.-Saudi Investment Forum. This partnership aims to explore and develop opportunities in the rare earth sector.
news.headline: Maaden and MP Materials aim to establish a full rare earth value chain partnership, as per newly signed MoU agreement.

news.summary: Decentralized AI solution provider OORT's training image data set gained significant success on Google's platform Kaggle, reaching the first page in multiple categories, including General AI, Retail & Shopping, Manufacturing, and Engineering. The data set was developed through a decentralized model, attracting engagement and interest from data scientists and machine learning engineers. OORT plans to release more data sets in the future, such as in-car voice commands and deepfake videos. AI experts noted the importance of high-quality training data, which is becoming scarce, particularly human-generated text data. The rise in "image poisoning" techniques poses challenges to AI training with open-source data sets, highlighting the value of verifiable and community-driven data sets like OORT's in ensuring data quality and trust in the AI industry.
news.headline: OORT AI data achieves top spots on Google Kaggle, engaging data scientists and ML engineers. Data set hit first page in multiple categories. Future plans include more data sets in the pipeline. Importance of high-quality AI training data emphasized due to scarcity and challenges with human-generated data.

news.summary: Newswire reports that IOTech has unveiled the latest version of Edge Central in San Francisco. This new release is set to drive the development of AI-powered industrial edge solutions. The product is designed to cater to the needs of the next generation of industrial edge technology, further enhancing efficiency and productivity in the sector. The update is expected to have a significant impact on the industry, with experts predicting a surge in the adoption of AI-driven solutions for industrial processes.
news.headline: IOTech releases Edge Central to power AI-driven industrial edge solutions, revolutionizing tech advancements.

news.summary: On May 14th, 2025, Burford Capital Limited, a prominent global finance and asset management company specializing in law, made note of an announcement by MSCI regarding a country classification change for its MSCI Global Standard Indexes. This alteration holds significance for investors and stakeholders monitoring global market trends. Burford's attention to this change reflects the company's commitment to staying informed about developments that may impact their operations and investments.
news.headline: MSCI reclassifies Burford Capital to USA from UK, impacting MSCI Global Standard Indexes.

news.summary: A recent study by GoDaddy revealed emerging shopping trends among Gen Z and Millennials, reshaping the commerce sector. The survey conducted in Tempe, Arizona on May 14, 2025, underlined how younger shoppers are pushing boundaries in shopping practices. This shift is evident in the evolving consumer behaviors and preferences, reflecting new ways of engaging with businesses. The research, conducted by GoDaddy (NYSE: GDDY), showcased the influence of Gen Z and Millennials on the market, emphasizing their quirky habits impacting the commerce industry.
news.headline: GoDaddy survey shows Gen Z & Millennials prefer online shopping,  changing commerce.TEMPE, Ariz., May 14, 2025 /PRNewswire.
Top stock movers include NVDA, United Health, and SMCI reports.

news.summary: Update from Safe & Green Holdings Corp. (NASDAQ: SGBX) based in Miami, FL, on May 14, 2025, reveals a significant transformation for the Company. With $108 million in secured funding, the leading developer of modular structures is experiencing a surge in financial stability, operational efficiency, and strategic growth. Benefiting from robust market interest, Safe & Green Holdings highlights its recent accomplishments. The Company is actively pursuing an ambitious buy-and-build approach to bolster its presence in domestic and global markets.
news.headline: Safe & Green Holdings Corp. (SGBX) receives $108M funding, pursues buy-and-build strategy for growth across global markets.

news.summary: Successful achievement of feasibility endpoint in a recent study conducted by Atossa Therapeutics, Inc. (Nasdaq: ATOS) shows promising results. The study revealed a rapid suppression of Ki-67 with substantial tumor shrinkage confirmed by MRI. This was achieved with a favorable safety profile. The results suggest a potential breakthrough in the treatment of the disease. The company's progress in this clinical-stage biopharmaceutical investigation is significant and noteworthy. It underlines the potential impact of their research and development efforts in the medical field.
news.headline: Atossa Therapeutics reports positive results from the I-SPY 2 study evaluating Low-Dose (Z)-Endoxifen, achieving feasibility endpoint, rapid Ki-67 suppression, substantial tumor shrinkage with a favorable safety profile.

news.summary: In a recent development, GordonMD Global Investments® has announced that Ted Myles will be taking on the role of Chief Executive Officer at Cellarity, a groundbreaking life sciences firm based in Beverly Hills, California. The appointment comes as Cellarity pushes forward with its mission to revolutionize the process of drug development. Myles is poised to lead the company during a period of acceleration and growth.
news.headline: Cellarity appoints Ted Myles as CEO, boosting leadership in scientific progress. GordonMD Investments welcomes move.

news.summary: A company based in Boulder, Colorado, TIFIN, revealed on May 14, 2025, the introduction of TIFIN AXIS, a collection of AI agents aimed at transforming mid-office functions in financial services. Utilizing TIFIN's established financial AI expertise, the platform is set to redefine operational processes.
news.headline: TIFIN debuts AXIS platform with AI agents to enhance middle office operations in financial services.

news.summary: A popular healthy snack brand is introducing a trial run of its new 18 oz. Original flavor at 105 Sam's Clubs in the Western region. This launch follows the strong reception of its Super Seed Everything option at Costco stores nationwide. The initiative is set to take place in RENO, Nev., starting on May 14, 2025. Mary's Gone Crackers is known for providing quality products to its consumers.
news.headline: Mary's Gone Crackers introduces new 18 oz. Original flavor in 105 Sam's Clubs in the West, following success at Costco.
Antalpha sets IPO price.

news.summary: HIVE Digital Ltd. achieved a new milestone with its Yguazù facility in Paraguay, surpassing 7 Exahash per second of global mining hashrate, marking a 10% month-over-month increase. The company completed a 100 MW air-cooled data center buildout, acquired from Bitfarms. New ASIC miners are expected to increase mining hashrate by 1 EH/s every two weeks. The company aims to reach 11.5 EH/s by June's end. HIVE's growth strategy without debt has attracted investors, resulting in a stock uptrend since April. Their focus on financially disciplined expansion, funded by Bitcoin mining proceeds, sets them apart from other miners prone to collapsing under debt.
news.headline: HIVE Digital (NASDAQ: HIVE) experiences rapid growth, surpassing 7 EH/s with plans to reach 11.5 EH/s by June. Stock trends upward.

news.summary: Dallas, May 14, 2025 - la Madeleine is introducing a fresh value proposition, combining comfort, quality, and a hint of café ambiance. The launch of le Pick 3 offers customers a handcrafted café meal at an affordable price of $8.99. This new value option provides a unique dining experience at a cost lower than typical fast-food combo meals.
news.headline: La Madeleine introduces 'Le Pick 3' meal for $8.99, offering quality dining at a bargain; reviving joyful café experience.

news.summary: In Homburg, Germany, on May 14, 2025, FAMAR Group, a prominent European pharmaceutical CDMO, confirmed the acquisition of a sterile production facility from MiP Pharma. This agreement marks a significant development for FAMAR, enhancing its capabilities in the region.
news.headline: FAMAR Group acquires sterile manufacturing site in Homburg, Germany from MiP Pharma, marking a strategic milestone.

news.summary: On May 14, 2025, IQSTEL Inc., a multinational technology company based in the U.S., commenced trading on The NASDAQ Capital Market with the ticker symbol IQST. This event signifies a significant achievement for the company as it now joins the NASDAQ Capital Market.
news.headline: IQST (NASDAQ: IQST) starts trading on NASDAQ as it aims for $1 billion revenue, marking a new era.

news.summary: Four Seasons has unveiled its 2027 itineraries, showcasing a decade of pioneering luxury air travel with over 40 global journeys to 30 different destinations. The latest offerings highlight the company's commitment to personalized hospitality in the sky. The announcement was made in Toronto on May 14, 2025, revealing the initial four exclusive journeys scheduled for 2027.
news.headline: Four Seasons unveils 2027 private jet itineraries with over 40 trips to 30 destinations, marking a decade of luxury in the skies.

news.summary: BARK, a prominent global dog brand trading on the NYSE under the ticker symbol BARK, has unveiled an expansion in services for their specialized airline, BARK Air. This unique airline, dedicated to prioritizing the well-being of dogs and their owners, is marking its one-year anniversary with enhancements. The upgrades include an increase in domestic and international flight options, alongside the introduction of private charter services. These developments aim to provide greater flexibility and convenience for passengers seeking dog-friendly air travel experiences.
news.headline: BARK Air marks first year with new routes, private charters for dog-friendly flights, expanding services.

news.summary: On May 14, 2025, the 22nd Annual Latinas & Power Symposium in HARTFORD, Conn., will double as a fundraiser for the 'Latinas in Leadership Institute'. The event features a diverse group of Latina speakers from various locations in the country, along with influential local personalities. This year's symposium promises to be impactful, serving as a platform for empowerment and support for Latinas.
news.headline: 22nd Latinas & Power Symposium to feature Latina speakers, actress, & leaders. Event now a fundraiser for 'Latinas in Leadership Institute'.

news.summary: In San Francisco, Zocks introduced their privacy-focused AI platform, transforming client discussions into useful data and insights. Today, they revealed Ameritas Investment Company, LLC (AIC) and Ameritas Advisory Services, LLC (AAS), both Ameritas subsidiaries, have opted for their solution to enhance advisor productivity and enrich client interactions. AIC and AAS, known for their progressive approach, aimed to incorporate cutting-edge AI technology to assist their registered representatives.
news.headline: Zocks partners with Ameritas to enhance advisor efficiency and client experience with AI platform.

news.summary: Obsidian Security, based in Newport Beach, California, has introduced a novel browser extension aimed at aiding businesses in the secure utilization of SaaS and AI applications on the internet. The extension is designed to automatically detect and oversee shadow SaaS and AI tools, prevent sophisticated spear-phishing assaults directed at access tokens, and provide immediate protection within the user's browser. This efficient, unobtrusive, and confidential extension has already been deployed on more than one million devices within the operations of two hundred sizeable and medium-sized enterprise clients.
news.headline: Obsidian Security unveils Shadow SaaS tool to manage apps, prevent threats, used on 1M+ devices for 200 enterprise clients.

news.summary: TARA Media, a data-driven marketing agency based in Chicago, has announced the addition of Programmatic Audio to their Media Buying Platform, allowing advertisers to enhance their access to streaming audio inventory. This move comes as advertisers look to take advantage of the increasing popularity of streaming audio. The integration of Programmatic Audio into TARA Media's platform aims to provide a more efficient and targeted approach for advertisers who are keen on reaching audiences through this channel. The initiative was revealed on May 14, 2025, and signifies TARA Media's commitment to staying ahead of industry trends.
news.headline: TARA Media partners with Triton Digital to offer programmatic audio advertising, optimizing access to streaming audio.

news.summary: A company specializing in authentic Mexican burritos, Tres Picosos, has expanded its presence in the retail grocery sector by introducing four different burrito flavors. As of May 14, 2025, these products can now be found in Safeway stores throughout Colorado. This development signifies the company's debut in the retail grocery market, offering consumers more choice and convenience.
news.headline: Tres Picosos expands, offering four burrito flavors in Safeway stores across Colorado, their first retail grocery presence.

news.summary: An enterprise AI leader, Kore.ai, based in Orlando, has revealed a strategic collaboration agreement with Amazon Web Services (AWS), a significant move in the field of AI adoption. The agreement involves integrating Kore.ai's agent AI platform and business solutions with various AWS services such as Amazon Bedrock, Amazon Q, and Amazon Connect. Through this partnership, the deployment of AWS AI tools for different business purposes will be expedited, showing Kore.ai's commitment to innovation. Noteworthy, Kore.ai was honored as an AWS Innovation Award recipient for its contribution to the "Generative AI/ML Market Disrup."
news.headline: Kore.ai partners with AWS to enhance enterprise AI adoption through integration of agent AI platform with AWS services.

news.summary: Alight, a company based in Chicago, has recently revealed the selection of David Essary to serve as its new Chief Strategy Officer. In his new position, Essary will be responsible for leading the corporate strategy of Alight.
news.headline: Alight names David Essary as Chief Strategy Officer to drive corporate strategy in Chicago.

news.summary: In Tampa, Florida on May 14, 2025, Teamwork Commerce, a prominent omnichannel retail management company, shared news that Clint Ridenour, who serves as the Technical Services Director and Client Success Manager, will be a speaker at Future Stores 2025. This event is scheduled for the specified date and will showcase industry insights.
news.headline: Clint Ridenour of Teamwork Commerce to speak at Future Stores 2025 event in Tampa. Leading omnichannel solution for retail management.

news.summary: Sprinklr (NYSE: CXM), a leading Unified-CXM platform, is set to unveil its first quarter financial results for fiscal year 2026 before the market opens on June 4, 2025. Interested parties can access the earnings press release on the Sprinklr Investor Relations website at investors.sprinklr.com. A conference call to review the results is scheduled for 8:30 am Eastern Time on the same day.
news.headline: Sprinklr to release Q1 2026 financial results on June 4, 2025, earnings press release available on investor website.

news.summary: Concentric AI, based in San Jose, California, has recently been granted its fifth patent in recognition of its commitment to advancing data security. The latest patent solidifies the company's position as a leader in enhancing user security groups and managing data access permissions to reduce risks. Titled "Methods and Systems for Optimizing Grouping for Enhanced Access Control and Risk Mitigation in an Enterprise," the patent underscores Concentric AI's ongoing innovation in the field. This achievement highlights the company's dedication to pioneering efforts in data security and further establishes its competitive edge in the industry.
news.headline: Concentric AI receives a fifth patent for innovating on user security groups for risk mitigation.

news.summary: In Montreal, Komodo Health recently revealed that their healthcare intelligence platform played a pivotal role in facilitating 31 different research studies showcased at the 2025 International Society for Pharmacoeconomics and Outcomes Research (ISPOR) global conference. Among these, three studies were spearheaded by Komodo researchers, while the remaining 27 were a result of collaborations with academic institutions, Life Sciences companies, and healthcare organizations. This indicates a substantial impact of their platform, illuminating the range and quantity of research endeavors powered by their healthcare insights.
news.headline: Komodo Health's platform enabled 31 studies at ISPOR 2025, including 3 led by Komodo and 27 collaborative studies.

news.summary: A media outlet in Chile, Canal 13, has recently implemented a comprehensive content storage and management system utilizing Quantum’s Myriad alongside ActiveScale.
news.headline: Canal 13 in Chile uses Quantum's Myriad with ActiveScale for content storage, management, and operations.

news.summary: Axoft, a neurotechnology company based in Cambridge, Massachusetts, has unveiled a new product called Fleuron™, consisting of ultra-soft materials tailored for research and industrial use in the field of Brain-Computer Interfaces (iBCIs). This innovative material aims to enhance iBCIs by offering exceptional biocompatibility, which helps decrease tissue scarring and the migration of leads over time. Fleuron™ is now available for purchase by organizations involved in research and development. The material was successfully employed in Axoft's recent first-in-human trial, showcasing its potential in advancing neurotechnology.
news.headline: Axoft releases Fleuron for purchase to enhance Brain-Computer Interfaces, reducing tissue scarring. - Business Wire

news.summary: In Plano, Texas, Diodes Incorporated (Nasdaq: DIOD) revealed a key leadership change in its long-term succession plan. Gary Yu, who took on the role of President starting January 2, 2024, has now been named Chief Executive Officer. Dr. Keh-Shew Lu will maintain his position as Chairman of the Board. Dr. Lu praised Gary's outstanding leadership since stepping into the President role earlier this year. This transition marks a significant shift in management within the company.
news.headline: Diodes Inc. named Gary Yu CEO, replacing Dr. Keh-Shew Lu. Yu was President since January 2024. Keh-Shew Lu remains Chairman.

news.summary: In New York today, Universal Ads introduced the Incrementality Fund, a $5 million initiative aimed at aiding e-commerce businesses in boosting sales through TV advertising. The fund offers eligible merchants the opportunity to access up to $50,000 in ad credits and services. These services include assistance with ad creative production and incrementality measurement solutions. This initiative aims to support brands of all sizes in effectively creating, purchasing, and evaluating ads on premium video platforms.
news.headline: Comcast's Universal Ads introduces $5M fund to aid e-commerce growth via TV ads. Offers up to $50K in credits & services.

news.summary: A company called XiFin, Inc. based in San Diego, a specialist in revenue cycle management and billing solutions leveraging artificial intelligence, revealed results from its first Specialty Pharmacy survey at the AXS25 specialty pharmacy summit hosted by Asembia. The survey indicates a growing trend in the industry towards playing a larger role in meeting patient care demands, especially in handling chronic conditions that necessitate intricate medication schedules. This suggests a shift towards addressing complex medical needs.
news.headline: XiFin survey shows growth potential in specialty pharmacy with focus on addressing complex medication needs.

news.summary: ZEVASKYN, the inaugural cell-based gene therapy for individuals diagnosed with recessive dystrophic epidermolysis bullosa (RDEB), has been officially launched in the United States. This pioneering therapy offers new hope for patients grappling with this rare genetic skin disorder. Available through commercial channels, ZEVASKYN represents a breakthrough in treatment options for RDEB sufferers.
news.headline: Abeona Therapeutics and Lurie Children's launch first ZEVASKYN Gene Therapy Center for treating RDEB patients in the US.

news.summary: In Marlborough, Mass. and Evanston, Wyo., XL Batteries, an energy storage company, along with Prometheus Hyperscale, a sustainable data center developer, have signed a multi-year deal. This partnership aims to install long-lasting energy storage systems at data centers. The global power requirement for data centers is predicted to surge by up to 165% by 2030. This collaboration shows an effort to address the growing demand for reliable grid-scale batteries in the face of increasing energy needs in data centers worldwide.
news.headline: XL Batteries and Prometheus Hyperscale partner to deploy energy storage systems at US data centers. Global power demand from data centers expected to rise by up to 165% by 2030.

news.summary: EnCap Flatrock Midstream, an energy investment manager based in San Antonio, has promoted Matthew Melton to managing director and Ian Morris to vice president. Melton, who has been with the company for eight years, has played a key role in its growth and success. EnCap Flatrock Managing Partner Sam Pitts hailed Melton as a team player with integrity and humility. The company expressed enthusiasm for Melton's ongoing development.
news.headline: EnCap Flatrock Midstream promotes Matthew Melton to Managing Director and Ian Morris to Vice President in San Antonio.

news.summary: Wilsonville-based company ESS Tech, Inc. (NYSE: GWH), known for its iron flow long-duration energy storage systems, will be hosting a conference call on May 15, 2025, at 5:00 p.m. EDT. The call will focus on the financial outcomes of the first quarter of 2025 that concluded on March 31, 2025. The official news release detailing the financial results will be shared after the market closes on the same day. ESS Tech, Inc. caters to commercial and utility-scale sectors and is a prominent player in the energy storage industry.
news.headline: ESS Tech, Inc. to discuss Q1 2025 financial results on May 15, 2025 at 5:00 p.m. EDT after market close.

news.summary: Cryptocurrency analyst Michael van de Poppe observed that Bitcoin (BTC) is currently consolidating near record levels, indicating a potential breakout above its all-time high. The leading cryptocurrency is currently trading at $104,030.18, marking a 0.25% increase over the last 24 hours, with a total market capitalization of $2.06 trillion. Altcoins are showing strong momentum and breaking out significantly, suggesting signs of a bull market. Ethereum (ETH) has seen a 4.42% gain, reaching $2,625.37 with a market cap of $316.95 billion. Van de Poppe's insights were shared on X and discussed the latest market movements.
news.headline: Bitcoin consolidates near record levels, altcoins see momentum surge. BTC trades at $104,030.18, $2.06 trillion market cap. ETH at $2,625.37, $316.95 billion market cap. Bullish signs per analyst Michaël van de Poppe.

news.summary: On May 14, 2025, in New York City, Presage Global, a firm specializing in intelligence-driven risk management for high-net-worth individuals, global corporations, and institutional investors, achieved victory in the "Security Consulting & Risk Management" division at the renowned Twelfth Annual awards ceremony. The firm's expertise in this field has been recognized by industry leaders and experts.
news.headline: Presage Global wins top award for Security Consulting & Risk Management at 2025 Family Wealth Report Awards.

news.summary: US stock futures rebounded in premarket trading on Wednesday following a mixed finish the previous day. The S&P 500 and Nasdaq 100 turned positive for the year, with the tech sector's gains driven by chipmaker Nvidia. The 10-year Treasury bond yielded 4.45% and the two-year bond was at 3.99%. The market indicates a 91.8% chance of the Federal Reserve maintaining current interest rates in June. In premarket trading, the SPDR S&P 500 ETF Trust and Invesco QQQ Trust ETF were up. Sectors like information technology and energy saw gains, while health care and consumer staples fell. The Consumer Price Index for April rose 2.3% year-over-year. The S&P 500 was up 0.31% YTD, Dow Jones down -0.59% YTD, and Nasdaq 100 up 1.06% YTD. Nasdaq Composite rose 1.61% and Russell 2000 climbed 0.49%. According to analyst Ryan Detrick, the market is showing potential for further gains. Over 60% of S&P 500 components hit new 20-day highs, indicating bullish implications.
news.headline: US stock futures trade higher after inflation report for April, S&P 500 and Nasdaq 100 turn positive for the year. Nasdaq Composite index rises 1.61% to 19,010.08, S&P 500 up 0.72% to 5,886.55, Dow Jones down 0.64% to 42,140.43. Detrick highlights bullish signal with over 60% of S&P 500 at new highs.
IO Biotech's Q1 2025 financial report and business highlights released, showing positive performance.

news.summary: In Minneapolis, Deluxe (NYSE: DLX), a reputable Payments and Data firm, recently revealed a key collaboration with MyKidReports, a prominent childcare management software provider. This partnership aims to merge Deluxe's secure payment processing services with the MyKidReports platform, allowing childcare centers, notably those in the nonprofit realm, to enhance their tuition and fee collection processes. The integration will enable childcare providers to efficiently streamline their payment procedures, offering a seamless experience for users.
news.headline: Deluxe and MyKidReports team up to streamline payments for nonprofit childcare centers using Deluxe's payment processing capabilities.

news.summary: Yesterday, Landsbankinn held a covered bond auction that included a covered bond exchange opportunity. Holders of the series LBANK CB 25 were able to sell their covered bonds in the series in exchange for covered bonds purchased in the auction at a set clean price of 98.103. This initiative provided investors with a chance to participate in the auction and make transactions at a predetermined price point.
news.headline: Landsbankinn held a covered bond exchange offering for series LBANK CB 25 at a predefined price of 98.103.

news.summary: Dine Brands Global, Inc. (NYSE: DIN), located in Pasadena, California, the owning corporation of Applebee's Neighborhood Grill + Bar®, IHOP®, and Fuzzy’s Taco Shop® restaurants, declared a quarterly cash dividend of $0.51 per common stock share. This dividend is scheduled for payment on July 9, 2025, to stockholders recorded by June 20, 2025.
news.headline: Dine Brands Global, Inc. declares a $0.51 per share dividend, payable on July 9, 2025, to stockholders of record on June 20.

news.summary: Based in Foster City, California, Conviva, a leading provider of real-time performance analytics, released findings from their latest global study, the 2025 State of Digital Experience Report. In the modern attention-driven economy, providing top-notch digital experiences has become crucial for success in various sectors. Yet, the research indicates a concerning trend of escalating discontent among consumers who are becoming less tolerant of subpar online interactions. Shockingly, the report highlights that 91% of consumers have faced frustrating digital experiences.
news.headline: 91% consumers affected by poor digital experiences, impacting business revenues.

news.summary: In Davidson, North Carolina, Curtiss-Wright Corporation (NYSE: CW) revealed that their Board of Directors has approved an extra $400 million for upcoming share buybacks, bringing the total authorization to $534 million. Additionally, they announced a 14% raise in the quarterly dividend to $0.24 per share, with payments scheduled for July 7, 2025. Only stockholders recorded as of June 16, 2025, will receive the dividend. This move is part of the company's commitment to maintaining a steady capital allocation strategy.
news.headline: Curtiss-Wright boosts share repurchase authorization by $400 million and raises dividend by 14% to $0.24 per share.
